title: Inclusion of industrial area within newly created municipality prohibited
doc_html:
§1203.  Inclusion of industrial area within newly created municipality prohibited

No portion of an industrial area that provides any of the services enumerated in R.S. 51:1202 shall be included within any newly created municipality.

Acts 1995, No. 581, §4, eff. June 18, 1995.
doc_text:
§1203.  Inclusion of industrial area within newly created municipality prohibited
No portion of an industrial area that provides any of the services enumerated in R.S. 51:1202 shall be included within any newly created municipality.
Acts 1995, No. 581, §4, eff. June 18, 1995.
